CRITICAL.title: XSS Vulnerability in Login Form
CRITICAL.description: User input is not properly escaped in login form
steps_to_reproduce: 3. Observe if script tags are rendered
CRITICAL.actual_behavior: Script tags are rendered in response
CRITICAL.root_cause: User input not escaped in template rendering
CRITICAL.suggested_fix: Use Flask Jinja2 autoescaping (enabled by default) and validate template rendering

CRITICAL.title: Potential SQL Injection Vulnerability
CRITICAL.description: Student search endpoint may be vulnerable to SQL injection
CRITICAL.expected_behavior: Query should be parameterized and safe
CRITICAL.actual_behavior: SQL injection pattern detected in response
CRITICAL.root_cause: User input not properly parameterized in SQL queries
CRITICAL.suggested_fix: Ensure all queries use parameterized queries with %s placeholders

HIGH.title: Missing User Table Fields
HIGH.expected_behavior: All user records should have: id, username, email, role, gender, is_active
HIGH.root_cause: mock_db.json not properly initialized with all required fields
HIGH.suggested_fix: Update mock_db.json initialization to include all required fields

HIGH.title: Missing CSRF Protection on Forms
HIGH.expected_behavior: All forms should include a CSRF token
HIGH.actual_behavior: No CSRF token found in form
HIGH.root_cause: CSRF protection not implemented in Flask app
HIGH.suggested_fix: Implement Flask-WTF for CSRF protection on all forms

HIGH.title: Unreliable Database Connection
HIGH.description: Database connection exists but is not properly initialized
HIGH.expected_behavior: Database should be either MySQL or properly initialized mock
HIGH.suggested_fix: Add connection validation and health check in database.py

HIGH.title: Session Fixation Vulnerability
HIGH.description: Session ID does not change after login
HIGH.expected_behavior: New session ID should be generated after successful login
HIGH.root_cause: Session regeneration not implemented in login handler
HIGH.suggested_fix: Call session.clear() and regenerate session ID after successful login
